pr.title: Add Cursor Hermes handoff workflows
pr.body: ## What does this PR do? Adds the next read-only Cursor/Hermes Town integration increment: a bounded handoff bundle MCP tool plus Cursor command playbooks for bootstrap, agent handoff, held-spec checks, and gateway status. ## Related Issue N/A ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality) - [ ] Security fix - [x] Documentation update - [x] Tests (adding or improving test coverage) - [ ] Refactor (no behavior change) - [ ] New skill (bundled or hub) ## Changes Made - Add `town_handoff_bundle()` read-only MCP tool for named-agent and/or spec handoff context. - Package bounded SOUL, registry, heartbeat, latest-state, held-spec, contradiction, and HOT learnings context without writes. - Add Cursor command playbooks: `/cursor-bootstrap`, `/agent-handoff`, `/held-specs`, `/gateway-status`. - Update MCP docs/rules from 11 to 12 skills/context tools. - Add focused tests for handoff bundle output and diagnostics registration. ## How to Test 1. `scripts/run_tests.sh tests/test_hermes_skills_mcp_snapshot.py tests/test_cursor_mcp_config.py tests/test_mcp_serve.py -- -q` 2. `venv/bin/hermes doctor --mcp` 3. `venv/bin/ruff check hermes_skills_mcp.py mcp_serve.py tests/test_cursor_mcp_config.py tests/test_hermes_skills_mcp_snapshot.py tests/test_mcp_serve.py` ## Checklist ### Code - [ ] I've read the Contributing Guide - [ ] My commit messages follow Conventional Commits - [ ] I searched for existing PRs to make sure this isn't a duplicate - [x] My PR contains only changes related to this fix/feature (no unrelated commits) - [ ] I've run the full test suite and all tests pass - [x] I've added tests for my changes - [x] I've tested on my platform: Linux ### Documentation & Housekeeping - [x] I've updated relevant documentation (README, `docs/`, docstrings) — or N/A - [x] I've updated `cli-config.yaml.example` if I added/changed config keys — or N/A - [x] I've updated `CONTRIBUTING.md` or `AGENTS.md` if I changed architecture or workflows — or N/A - [x] I've considered cross-platform impact — or N/A - [x] I've updated tool descriptions/schemas if I changed tool behavior — or N/A ## For New Skills N/A ## Screenshots / Logs Focused tests, MCP doctor smoke check, and ruff passed locally. `hermes doctor --mcp` reports `attention` only because no gateway is running in this environment; skills/context tools are healthy and report 12 registered read-only tools.
pr.author: Warrenpoobear
